headline: Will Sector-Wide AI Chip Volatility and Cloud Capex Jitters Change Seagate Technology Holdings' (STX) Narrative
summary: In recent days, Seagate Technology Holdings has come under pressure as a sector-wide selloff in memory and AI chip stocks followed SK Hynix’s sharp drop and renewed worries about cloud spending, inventory levels, and macro risks such as Middle East tensions and inflation. At the same time, Seagate remains closely tied to expectations for AI and cloud infrastructure demand, leaving its story caught between enthusiasm for its high-capacity Mozaic 4+ drives and investor concerns about a...
